Project Smoke Test notes.

This document exists to verify the per-project RAG pipeline end-to-end.
The magic number is 42.
It is the canonical answer used by the Phase 1.1 walkthrough probe question.
Any answer to "What is the magic number?" must cite this line as source [1].
Unrelated filler sentence about calibration procedures.
Another filler line to give the chunker more than one chunk boundary to work with.
